# seerr_notification_telegram (Data Source)

Read Seerr telegram notification settings via /api/v1/settings/notifications/telegram.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `embed_poster` (Boolean)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `notification_types` (Set of String)
- `telegram` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--telegram))

<a id="nestedatt--telegram"></a>
### Nested Schema for `telegram`

Read-Only:

- `bot_api` (String, Sensitive)
- `bot_username` (String)
- `chat_id` (String)
- `send_silently` (Boolean)
